mlb.headline: Red Sox rally in 10th, complete four-game sweep of Yankees
mlb.summary: Jarren Duran singled home the winning run to cap a three-run rally in the 10th inning after Boston blew a two-run lead in the ninth, and the Red Sox finished a four-game sweep of the rival New York Yankees with a 5-4 victory Sunday night at Fenway Pa

mlb.headline: 2026 MLB ABS challenge system tracker: Team, player rankings
mlb.summary: The ABS challenge system leaderboard ranks batters, catchers, teams and umpires throughout the MLB season.

mlb.headline: Red Sox rally past Yankees 5-4 in 10 innings to complete 4-game sweep after Gray loses no-hit bid
mlb.summary: — Jarren Duran singled home the winning run to cap a three-run rally in the 10th inning after Boston blew a two-run lead in the ninth, and the Red Sox finished a four-game sweep of the rival New York Yankees with a 5-4 victory Sunday night.

mlb.headline: NBC consults with PGA Tour, MLB, turns to Yankees-Red Sox late
mlb.summary: NBC preempted the Yankees-Red Sox "Sunday Night Baseball" game in favor of the Travelers Championship, which ran late after rain suspended final-round play for nearly 90 minutes.

mlb.headline: New York Yankees vs. Boston Red Sox: Game Highlights
mlb.summary: New York Yankees vs. Boston Red Sox: Game Highlights

mlb.headline: Houston Astros vs. Detroit Tigers: Game Highlights
mlb.summary: Houston Astros vs. Detroit Tigers: Game Highlights

nhl.headline: Predators sign faceoff ace Jack Drury to 5-year, $22.5M deal
nhl.summary: The Predators signed forward Jack Drury to a five-year, $22.5 million contract on Sunday night, four days after he was acquired from the Avalanche.

nhl.headline: 2026 NHL draft grades: Best, worst, most surprising picks
nhl.summary: Which teams added the most value this weekend? Who whiffed badly? We grade all 32 here.

nhl.headline: 7-foot-1 Alexander Karmanov tallest player drafted in NHL
nhl.summary: The Sharks selected 7-foot-1 defenseman Alexander Karmanov, making the 18-year-old the tallest player ever drafted by an NHL team.

nhl.headline: Which 2026 NHL draft picks should I have on my fantasy hockey team?
nhl.summary: Which top picks from the 2026 NHL draft should you draft for next season's fantasy hockey teams?

nhl.headline: Winners, losers of the 2026 NHL draft: Rangers, Leafs, Blackhawks
nhl.summary: Now that all the selections have been made, what stands out the most? Here are the picks, trades and moments we'll remember -- for better or worse.

nhl.headline: 2026 NHL draft updates: 7-round, 32-team pick tracker
nhl.summary: The draft is complete. Here's a list of every selection, including detailed analysis for the top 32.

nba.headline: 2026 NBA offseason trade grades: Miles Bridges, LaMelo Ball deals
nba.summary: We're grading the biggest NBA trades of the offseason, including the deal that sent Miles Bridges from Charlotte to Phoenix.

nba.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, updates
nba.summary: We're tracking the latest news, rumors and buzz across the NBA, including what we're hearing ahead of free agency.

nba.headline: NBA trade tracker: Updates for every deal of the 2026 offseason
nba.summary: We have the updates, including players and draft picks, for every NBA trade made this summer.

nba.headline: Sources: Hornets trade veteran Miles Bridges to Suns
nba.summary: The Hornets are trading Miles Bridges, a 2029 first-round pick and a second-round pick to the Suns for Grayson Allen, Royce O'Neale and a 2033 first.

nba.headline: NBA free agency 2026: How much all 30 teams can spend this summer
nba.summary: Which front offices boast the most spending power? Which are battling to avoid the second apron? Bobby Marks examines all 30 teams.

nba.headline: Orlando Magic waive forward Jonathan Isaac
nba.summary: The Magic have waived forward Jonathan Isaac, which will save Orlando $6.5 million, according to ESPN's Bobby Marks.

wnba.headline: Scuffling Liberty call for more 'heart' after latest loss
wnba.summary: The Liberty are searching for answers after their fourth loss in five games, with star forward Breanna Stewart challenging her team to play with more heart.

wnba.headline: Charles ties season high with 13 points as Valkyries down Liberty 76-67
wnba.summary: — Kaila Charles tied a season high with 13 points off the bench and the Golden State Valkyries held the New York Liberty to their lowest-scoring first half of the season en route to a 76-67 victory on Sunday night.

wnba.headline: Golden State Valkyries vs. New York Liberty - Game Highlights
wnba.summary: Watch the Game Highlights from Golden State Valkyries vs. New York Liberty, 06/28/2026

wnba.headline: A'ja Wilson, Las Vegas Aces top Kamilla Cardoso, Chicago Sky
wnba.summary: Four-time MVP A'ja Wilson finished with 30 points and 15 rebounds Sunday as the Aces posted a 107-99 victory over Kamilla Cardoso and the Chicago Sky at United Center, Las Vegas' 14th win of the season and second in a row.

wnba.headline: Mystics win marathon matchup, beat Fire in record-tying 4 OTs
wnba.summary: Sonia Citron scored a career-high 32 points, including the basket that put her team ahead to stay with 21.4 seconds left, and the Washington Mystics held off the Portland Fire 124-123 on Sunday in four overtimes -- tying the longest game in WNBA hist

wnba.headline: Mystics win a marathon matchup, topping Fire 124-123 in record-tying 4 OTs
wnba.summary: — Sonia Citron scored 32 points, including the basket that put her team ahead to stay with 21.4 seconds left, and the Washington Mystics held off the Portland Fire 124-123 on Sunday in four overtimes — tying the longest game in WNBA history.

wnba.headline: Washington Mystics vs. Fire - Game Highlights
wnba.summary: Watch the Game Highlights from Washington Mystics vs. Fire, 06/28/2026

wnba.headline: A’ja Wilson has a WNBA first with 30 points, 15 rebounds, 4 steals, 3 blocks in Aces' win over Sky
wnba.summary: — A’ja Wilson had 30 points, 15 rebounds, four steals and three blocks to become the first player in WNBA history to reach those marks in a game as the Las Vegas Aces beat the Chicago Sky 107-99 on Sunday.

wnba.headline: Chicago Sky vs. Las Vegas Aces - Game Highlights
wnba.summary: Watch the Game Highlights from Chicago Sky vs. Las Vegas Aces, 06/28/2026

wnba.headline: Lynx coach Cheryl Reeve ties WNBA regular-season wins record
wnba.summary: Cheryl Reeve tied Mike Thibault's WNBA record for career coaching wins at 379 as the Minnesota Lynx beat the Dallas Wings 85-77 on Sunday.

wnba.headline: Howard and Miles score 21, Reeve ties WNBA coaching wins record as Lynx beat Wings 85-77
wnba.summary: — Natasha Howard had 21 points and 14 rebounds, Olivia Miles added 21 points and eight assists and Cheryl Reeve tied the WNBA record for career coaching wins as the Minnesota Lynx beat the Dallas Wings 85-77 on Sunday.

wnba.headline: Lynx go on the road and take down the Wings
wnba.summary: Lynx go on the road and take down the Wings

wnba.headline: Rookies Flau'jae Johnson and Awa Fam lead the Storm to a 105-90 victory over the Dream
wnba.summary: — Flau'jae Johnson had 24 points and 11 rebounds, fellow rookie Awa Fam scored 21 points and the Seattle Storm never trailed in a 105-90 victory over the Atlanta Dream on Saturday night.

wnba.headline: Parker, Delle Donne, Reeve enter Women's Basketball Hall of Fame
wnba.summary: Candace Parker and Elena Delle Donne, former rivals who each won two WNBA MVP awards, and Cheryl Reeve, who has won four titles as head coach, have been enshrined in the Women's Basketball Hall of Fame.

wnba.headline: Seattle Storm vs. Atlanta Dream - Game Highlights
wnba.summary: Watch the Game Highlights from Seattle Storm vs. Atlanta Dream, 06/27/2026

ncaab.headline: 2026 college baseball transfer portal rankings: The top 60 players
ncaab.summary: Ranking the best players who have entered the portal and where they have already committed.

ncaab.headline: AD Roger Denny speaks on the grit and resilience of Oklahoma baseball
ncaab.summary: Denny gives credit to the Sooners for the hard work and dedication they put in on the field this season as he gives a shoutout to Skip Johnson for leading them through it all.

ncaab.headline: Skip Johnson expresses gratitude and pride in Boomer Sooner nation
ncaab.summary: Johnson commends the Sooners on their resilient attitude all season as he emphasizes the significance of the fans showing up in Omaha and their impact on the national title win.

ncaab.headline: Joseph Harroz Jr. on OU winning MCWS: 'This is a story of stories'
ncaab.summary: OU President Harroz Jr. gives credit to the Sooners after becoming the 10th team to win three MCWS titles, stating that "we're no Cinderella story, we're the University of Oklahoma".

ncaab.headline: Skip Johnson explains how OU's selflessness led to MCWS title
ncaab.summary: Johnson joins The Paul Finebaum Show and describes how the Sooners' attention to detail, confidence and support for each other got them to winning the national championship.

ncaab.headline: 2026 college baseball wrap-up: Favorite MCWS moments, early 2027 predictions
ncaab.summary: We recap the 2026 postseason and look ahead to next year's tournament.

tennis.headline: Wimbledon experts' picks: Who will win?

tennis.headline: Sinner wants to 'talk about tennis,' not prize-money protest

tennis.headline: Serena Williams faces long Wimbledon odds; Jannik Sinner favored
tennis.summary: Serena Williams is a betting long shot to win Wimbledon in her return to singles play, while Jannik Sinner is the odds-on favorite to take home the men's title at the grass-court Grand Slam.

f1.headline: Lewis Hamilton labels Austrian GP a 'reality check,' Ferrari off the 'pace' against strong Mercedes

f1.headline: McLaren boss Zak Brown not ruling out Max Verstappen move with bizarre 'banana peel' reference

football.headline: O.J. Simpson won't be honored among Bills legends at new stadium

football.headline: Brandon Aiyuk blames ex-agent as push to leaves 49ers continues
football.summary: Brandon Aiyuk said in a YouTube video that his former agent has influenced the ongoing situation between him and 49ers and that general manager John Lynch recently showed up at his house.
